text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is here. Finally, it's time
for Inari One to go head-to-head against Oguri
Cap and Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is fired up, ready to jump into this
major race that will determine her fate.
